inputs.label: Desktop folder
inputs.description: Folder Copper scans for incoming .torrent files.

inputs.label: Auto run monitor
inputs.description: Continuously monitor the desktop and move new torrent files automatically.

inputs.label: Poll interval (seconds)
inputs.description: How often the daemon scans the desktop for new .torrent files.

inputs.label: Extension package (.zip or .tar.gz)
inputs.description: Package file used when installing an extension from this page.

inputs.label: Extensions install directory
inputs.description: Target folder for installed extension packages.

actions.label: Move .torrent files from Desktop to Torrents
actions.description: Run the organizer immediately using the saved monitor settings.
actions.script: Move .torrent files from desktopFolder to torrentsFolder and report summary.

actions.label: Add extension package via UI input
actions.description: Install the selected extension package into the configured extensions directory.
actions.script: Install extensionPackage into extensionsInstallDir and persist install metadata.

actions.label: Show extension configuration summary
actions.description: Display the persisted configuration and recent install metadata.
actions.script: Read persisted configuration and show it in UI detail view.
